title: ShinobiOrigin's Utils
description: A Library mod for Shinobi Origins, that adds features such as allowing entities (Like CustomNpcs) to use jutsu's with commands, and other featues
body:
For Any Issues please make a ticket in our Discord with the title: Util's Issue
Discord Invite: https://discord.gg/YRZxzPE5FS

This is a utility/library mod for shinobi origins
Adds Mixins support

ExecuteJutsu command can be used by CustomNpcs to use jutsu by passing it's entityUUID into the last argument

Adds executejutsu command -> /executejutsu <learnerName> <jutsuIndex> <power> <entityUUID>(optional) <- Requires OP to run command
Example: /executejutsu ninjutsu 2 1 <- this will summon a shadow clone
Dojutsu's and jutsu's that constantly require chakra won't work at the moment
For the JutsuIndex look at the number next to the jutsu on the learner
Jutsu Names By Learner:

FireRelease -> fire or katon
WindRelease -> wind or futon
EarthRelease -> earth or doton
WaterRelease -> water or suiton
LightningRelease -> lightning or raiton
Senjutsu -> sagemode or senjutsu
KekkeiMora -> kekkeimora
YangRelease -> yang or yoton
YinRelease -> yin or inton
MedicalRelease -> medical or iryo
SixPathSenjutsu -> sixpathsenjutsu
WoodRelease -> wood or mokuton
ExplosionRelease -> explosion or bakuton
StormRelease -> storm or ranton
MagnetRelease -> magnet or jiton
IceRelease -> ice or hyoton
LavaRelease -> lava or yooton
DustRelease -> dust or jinton
ScorchRelease -> scorch or shakuton
BoilRelease -> boil or futton
SkeletalRelease -> skeletal or bone or shikotsumyaku
